items.title: Partnership Proposal — Hydrate IV Bar
items.summary: Hydrate IV Bar is proposing co-branded IV therapy packages for Miami and Houston locations. They have budget allocated and want a 20-minute call this week.
items.actionNeeded: Review partnership proposal and schedule call for Thursday or Friday.

items.title: UPQODE Website Launch — Approval Needed Today
items.summary: UPQODE team is blocked and cannot push website to production without final approval on copy changes. Client demo scheduled for tomorrow morning.
items.actionNeeded: Review and approve copy changes ASAP to unblock production deployment before tomorrow's client demo.

items.title: LeadMaker SDR Proposal Follow-up
items.summary: LeadMaker is following up on their full-time SDR proposal for inbound lead management and appointment setting after initial conversation on May 9.
items.actionNeeded: Review SDR proposal and decide whether to schedule call to discuss candidates.
